title: AcquisitionTimestamp
description: Rich timestamp schema with five distinct timestamp roles and optional evidence chain.

five_timestamps.description: Five-timestamp model capturing the full acquisition lifecycle.

collected_at.description: Moment the raw document was fetched from the source.

normalized_at.description: Moment the raw document was transformed into a NormalizedObservation.

persisted_at.description: Moment the artifact was written to persistent storage.

observed_at.description: Business-effective timestamp — when the event was perceived as happening.

source_published_at.description: Original publication timestamp as declared by the source.

timestamp_evidence.description: Optional chain-of-custody evidence for each timestamp to support audit and replay.

TimestampEvidence.title: TimestampEvidence
TimestampEvidence.description: Verifiable evidence for a single timestamp value, including source clock skew, reliability, and trace ID.

reliability.description: Confidence score (0..1) indicating how trustworthy this timestamp is.

clock_skew_ms.description: Measured or estimated clock skew in milliseconds between the observer and the source at collection time.

trace_id.description: Distributed tracing ID linking this timestamp evidence across the pipeline.
